members.label: table
members.description: kitchen island with stools in background
members.long_form_open_description: A rectangular dark-wood kitchen island centered in the kitchen area; appears to have seating (stools) on the near side and possible items on top. Island surface is darker than surrounding cabinetry and sits on a wood or tile floor distinct from living-room carpet.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Centered in the kitchen, directly beyond the living-room carpet; under pendant lights and between cabinets and refrigerator
